stiff hair and be foolhardy. Effects of Scorpio Ascendant, Ninth Navansa: The native will have
a fair coloured physique, be beautiful, like a deer, will possess calm and tawny eyes and
similar hair and strong body and be amiable to elders.
74-82. EFFECTS OF NAVANSAS IN SAGITTARIUS.
The native born in Sagittarius Ascendant, but in its various Navansas will obtain following
effects: Effects of Sagittarius Ascendant, First Navansa: The native will have charming big
nose, will possess sight, akin to that of a goat, be a gifted speaker, will have charming teeth
and hair, be fair in complexion, will have inset testicles and be fierce. Effects of Sagittarius
Ascendant, Second Navansa: The native will have a prominent head, be firm in disposition,
will have large eyes, strong waist and knees, ugly nose, tall stature and firm cheeks. Effects
of Sagittarius Ascendant, Third Navansa: The native will have skill in educating and in fine
